channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US markets surge after Trump announces he’s postponing strikes on Iran
item.description: Major US financial markets opened higher after US President Donald Trump announced he was postponing strikes on Iran.

item.title: Large pro-government rallies held in Tehran
item.description: Videos show large demonstrations in Tehran, where crowds waved Iranian flags and chanted in support of the government.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran says Trump’s peace talk claims are ‘fake news’
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard calls Trump a 'deceitful American president', accuses him of 'contradictory behaviour'.

item.title: Trump says Iran ‘wants peace’ after US military did ‘great job’
item.description: US President Donald Trump says ‘there’s a very good chance of a deal’ to end the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Have Israel, the US and Iran violated international law?
item.description: Civilian targets have been struck by all three warring parties.

item.title: Iranian officials dismiss claims of US talks
item.description: Senior Iranian officials deny that Iran held talks with the US

item.title: Moment missile strikes shortly after Israeli president’s visit
item.description: Shortly after a news conference, Israel's president was forced to take cover as a missile struck nearby.

item.title: Ukraine strikes key Russian oil port and refinery
item.description: Ukraine said it hit a key Russian oil terminal at Primorsk and a refinery in Ufa on Monday.

item.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
item.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

item.title: Air Canada crash at LaGuardia Airport: What happened, who were the victims?
item.description: The pilot and co-pilot were killed, and in total, 41 passengers were taken to hospital, along with two firefighters.
